name: Pseudo Red Beans and Rice
recipeIngredient: 2 cups crushed tomatoes or tomato juice
30 oz red beans, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onion, garlic, peppers, and celery in liquid until soft.
2. Add tomato and seasonings to taste, simmer about 10 minutes.
3. Add beans and simmer another 10 minutes.
4. Serve over cooked rice.
